summary: Cross-module UI/UX polish completing pathophysiology, maternal-child, and audit parity with established nursing modules. Fixed command palette tab IDs, flashcard exports, progress tracking, mobile tab scroll, PWA cache, and shared visual chrome.

visual_consistency: Pathophysiology and maternal-child now use shared module-header, module-progress-strip, module-breadcrumb, and badge-new patterns
ward.css extended: patho-tabs/mc-tabs, patho/mc progress strips, audit-summary-strip mobile stacking, rose/pink tab accent colors
Removed duplicate tab-bar CSS from pathophysiology.css and maternal_child.css (ward.css is canonical)
Dashboard pharmacy track badge uses badge-pharm utility instead of inline style
navigation_consistency: Breadcrumb + topbar Dashboard return link added to pathophysiology, maternal-child, and audit pages
Sidebar now lists Pathophysiology and NURS 148 — Maternal-Child under Nursing Modules
Audit page uses module-header chrome and data-module=audit
command_palette: Pathophysiology tab commands use correct hash IDs: core-concepts, disease-processes, compare-contrast, what-breaks-down
Export flashcards (MD) commands added for pathophysiology and maternal-child
Audit palette extended: pathophysiology, maternal_child, pharmacy_calculations filters
exportFlashcardsGlobal() supports pathophysiology and maternal_child API endpoints
export_features: Export Deck buttons on flashcard tabs; Pathophysiology.exportFlashcardDeck() and MaternalChild.exportFlashcardDeck()
progress_tracking_ui: MaternalChild.refreshModuleProgress() fetches /api/maternal-child/stats and updates progress bar after study actions
Replaced broken refreshProgressBar() dependency in maternal_child reportProgress
tab_navigation_mobile: ward-tabs.js: active tab scrollIntoView on ARIA sync for horizontal tab bars on small screens
patho-tabs and mc-tabs included in ward.css mobile overflow and touch-scroll rules
accessibility: aria-label on pathophysiology and maternal-child tablists
loading-state + aria-live on pathophysiology concept/disease/compare loaders and audit catalog
Audit loading placeholder uses shared loading-spinner component
pwa_polish: Cache list includes audit.css and audit.js for offline audit shell

before_after.patho_mc_chrome: Custom headers/strips only → breadcrumb + topbar return + shared module-* classes
before_after.audit_navigation: No breadcrumb/topbar return → matches all nursing module pages
before_after.command_palette_patho: Wrong tab hashes (concepts, diseases) → correct IDs matching WardTabs registry
before_after.exports: Patho/MC flashcards UI-only → API + command palette + in-tab Export Deck buttons
before_after.mc_progress: reportProgress called undefined refreshProgressBar → dedicated refreshModuleProgress
before_after.pwa_cache: Missing audit assets → full module CSS/JS including audit.js

remaining_inconsistencies: Per-module CSS still duplicates module-header/progress-strip rules in patho/mc files (harmless; ward.css canonical)
Mental health has no dedicated export tab (Phase 1 scaffold — safety drill only)
Some maternal-child tab loaders still plain text (antepartum/intrapartum containers)
Pathophysiology and maternal-child callout banners use module-specific styles (intentional accent colors)
